user.title: Aiphone (WP-2MED) — pair a new client
user.description:
1. On the WP-2MED main unit, navigate to 設定 → 各種設定 → アプリ連携 → 端末追加 (or similar 'add device' menu).
2. Wait until the screen shows the 'waiting for app' prompt.
3. Click Submit below — pairing should complete in 5–10 seconds.

If this Pi is not on the same LAN as your WP-2MED, this won't work — the pairing protocol uses LAN UDP broadcast and TLS.

data.termname: Display name (shown in the unit's call list)

failed.title: Pairing failed
failed.description: Try again? Make sure the WP-2MED is in 端末追加 mode and on the same LAN as Home Assistant.

progress.pairing: Pairing with WP-2MED — discovering on LAN, exchanging OTP, provisioning AWS IoT cert, registering display name…

error.wp_not_in_pairing_mode: WP-2MED did not respond. Make sure the unit is in 端末追加 mode and on the same LAN as Home Assistant.
error.tls_failed: Could not establish TLS to the unit. The unit may have already left pairing mode.
error.otp_verify_failed: OTP verification failed. The unit closed pairing — please retry.
error.cloud_failed: Cloud registration failed. Check Home Assistant's logs for details.
error.termname_failed: Display-name registration failed. Cert is provisioned but unit may not list this client.
error.unknown: Unknown error during pairing. Check Home Assistant's logs.

abort.already_configured: This Aiphone unit + client is already configured.
